message:
Running command: 
# Check the detailed routing log to see how far the antenna repair DRT got
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
echo "=== Step 71 DRT log (last 40 lines) ==="
tail -40 "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Process stats ==="
cat "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.process_stats.json" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== drt-run-0 contents ==="
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== drt-run-1 contents ==="
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-1/" 2>/dev/null
